title: Workforms tooltips for horizontal dropdown option
excerpt: On Workforms, the new horizontal layout feature for dropdown options is great, and what would make this even greater is the ability to add a tooltip to each option. So that when users hover over this option (I appreciate…

posts.author: dawnwrites (Dawn)
posts.cookedHtml:
On Workforms, the new horizontal layout feature for dropdown options is great, and what would make this even greater is the ability to add a tooltip to each option. So that when users hover over this option (I appreciate this will only work on desktop devices) a tooltip appears that describes what this option means for more context.

eg:

Ticket type
◦ Bug Report ◦ Feature Requests ◦ Something else

When hovering over Feature Requests, a tooltip would say:
Suggest what’s missing from our app and we’ll take your idea onboard!

Something to this effect.

Thanks!
